user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Wide World Importers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 14:58 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with territory planning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-01-10 10:15 EST
Subject: Follow-up: territory planning Review

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Wide World Importers
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on territory planning from our last session.

[00:05:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:09:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:11:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:19:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): The timeline for vendor dependencies is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:25:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:27:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:30:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:35:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.
